title: buildah manifest inspect --tls-verify=false Error: unknown flag: --tls-verify
body:
**Description** The flag `--tls-verify` is mentioned in [docs/buildah-manifest-inspect.1.md](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/docs/buildah-manifest-inspect.1.md) but the flag returns an Error I am just starting to use buildah with my own LAN registry for which I did not set up https. For easy reproducability my examples use a public available image. **Steps to reproduce the issue:** `buildah manifest inspect --tls-verify=false docker.io/victoriametrics/vmagent` **Describe the results you received:** `Error: unknown flag: --tls-verify` **Describe the results you expected:** I hoped to get a more consized representation of the manifest. I want to check the platform architectures. The skopeo command returns a lot of information that confuse me, because I am just a beginner.
skopeo inspect --tls-verify=false docker://docker.io/victoriametrics/vmagent

comments.body:
The `--tls-verify` option was added to `buildah manifest inspect` very recently, in #4912. It has not yet been released.

As a general rule, `man XYZ` is a better source of information for the version of XYZ installed on your system. Finding docs on the net runs the risk of version mismatches.
